name: astro-portfolio
description: A simple portfolio project built with Astro, Tailwind CSS, and vanilla JavaScript

scripts.db:migrate:all: pnpm db:migrate:submissions && pnpm db:migrate:auth && pnpm db:migrate:blog && pnpm db:migrate:comments && pnpm db:migrate:2fa
scripts.db:migrate:local:all: wrangler d1 execute portfolio-forms --local --file=./migrations/0001_create_submissions_table.sql && wrangler d1 execute portfolio-forms --local --file=./migrations/0002_create_auth_tables.sql && wrangler d1 execute portfolio-forms --local --file=./migrations/0003_create_blog_tables.sql && wrangler d1 execute portfolio-forms --local --file=./migrations/0004_create_comments_table.sql && wrangler d1 execute portfolio-forms --local --file=./migrations/0005_create_2fa_codes_table.sql
scripts.db:migrate:remote:all: wrangler d1 execute portfolio-forms --remote --file=./migrations/0001_create_submissions_table.sql && wrangler d1 execute portfolio-forms --remote --file=./migrations/0002_create_auth_tables.sql && wrangler d1 execute portfolio-forms --remote --file=./migrations/0003_create_blog_tables.sql && wrangler d1 execute portfolio-forms --remote --file=./migrations/0004_create_comments_table.sql && wrangler d1 execute portfolio-forms --remote --file=./migrations/0005_create_2fa_codes_table.sql

author: Md Akib Hasan
